---
title: "Linear Transformations"
---

# Linear Transformations in $\mathbb{R}^2$

A linear transformation $T:\mathbb{R}^2\to\mathbb{R}^2$ can be represented by a matrix

$$
A=\begin{pmatrix} a & b \\ c & d \end{pmatrix}.
$$

Using column vectors, the transformation is

$$
T\begin{pmatrix}x\\y\end{pmatrix}
=
A\begin{pmatrix}x\\y\end{pmatrix}
=
\begin{pmatrix}
ax+by \\
cx+dy
\end{pmatrix}.
$$

The first column of $A$ is where the basis vector $e_1=\begin{pmatrix}1\\0\end{pmatrix}$ goes. The second column is where $e_2=\begin{pmatrix}0\\1\end{pmatrix}$ goes:

$$
A e_1=\begin{pmatrix}a\\c\end{pmatrix},
\qquad
A e_2=\begin{pmatrix}b\\d\end{pmatrix}.
$$

Try changing the entries of $A$ below. The grey grid is the original coordinate grid; the blue/orange grid is its image under $A$.

```{=html}
<style>
  .matrix-widget {
    border: 1px solid #d8dde7;
    border-radius: 8px;
    background: #ffffff;
    margin: 1.25rem 0 1.75rem;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .matrix-widget-inner {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: minmax(230px, 310px) minmax(0, 1fr);
    gap: 0;
  }

  .matrix-controls {
    border-right: 1px solid #e3e7ef;
    padding: 18px;
    background: #f7f9fc;
  }

  .matrix-controls-title {
    font-size: 1rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin: 0 0 12px;
  }

  .matrix-input-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 10px;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
  }

  .matrix-input-grid label {
    display: grid;
    gap: 4px;
    font-size: 0.82rem;
    color: #4b5565;
  }

  .matrix-input-grid input {
    width: 100%;
    border: 1px solid #c8d0dc;
    border-radius: 6px;
    padding: 7px 8px;
    font: inherit;
    background: #ffffff;
  }

  .matrix-presets {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 8px;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
  }

  .matrix-presets button,
  .matrix-reset {
    border: 1px solid #c8d0dc;
    border-radius: 6px;
    background: #ffffff;
    color: #1f2937;
    padding: 6px 9px;
    font: inherit;
    font-size: 0.84rem;
    cursor: pointer;
  }

  .matrix-presets button:hover,
  .matrix-reset:hover {
    background: #edf2f7;
  }

  .matrix-stats {
    display: grid;
    gap: 8px;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
  }

  .matrix-stat {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    gap: 12px;
    border-top: 1px solid #e3e7ef;
    padding-top: 8px;
  }

  .matrix-stat strong {
    color: #111827;
    font-weight: 650;
  }

  .matrix-canvas-wrap {
    padding: 14px;
    min-width: 0;
  }

  .matrix-canvas {
    display: block;
    width: 100%;
    height: auto;
    aspect-ratio: 1.25;
    background: #ffffff;
  }

  .matrix-legend {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 14px;
    align-items: center;
    color: #4b5565;
    font-size: 0.86rem;
    padding: 0 2px 8px;
  }

  .matrix-legend span {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 6px;
  }

  .legend-line {
    width: 24px;
    height: 3px;
    border-radius: 999px;
    display: inline-block;
  }

  @media (max-width: 760px) {
    .matrix-widget-inner {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }

    .matrix-controls {
      border-right: 0;
      border-bottom: 1px solid #e3e7ef;
    }
  }
</style>

<div class="matrix-widget" id="matrix-transform-widget">
  <div class="matrix-widget-inner">
    <section class="matrix-controls" aria-label="Matrix controls">
      <div class="matrix-controls-title">Matrix entries</div>
      <div class="matrix-input-grid">
        <label>a<input id="matrix-a" type="number" step="0.1" value="1" inputmode="decimal"></label>
        <label>b<input id="matrix-b" type="number" step="0.1" value="0.6" inputmode="decimal"></label>
        <label>c<input id="matrix-c" type="number" step="0.1" value="-0.3" inputmode="decimal"></label>
        <label>d<input id="matrix-d" type="number" step="0.1" value="1" inputmode="decimal"></label>
      </div>

      <div class="matrix-presets" aria-label="Preset matrices">
        <button type="button" data-matrix="1,0,0,1">Identity</button>
        <button type="button" data-matrix="1,0.8,0,1">Shear</button>
        <button type="button" data-matrix="0,-1,1,0">Rotate 90</button>
        <button type="button" data-matrix="1,0,0,-1">Reflect</button>
        <button type="button" data-matrix="1,0,0,0">Project</button>
        <button type="button" data-matrix="1.2,0.7,-0.4,0.9">Mixed</button>
      </div>

      <button type="button" class="matrix-reset" id="matrix-reset">Reset</button>

      <div class="matrix-stats" aria-live="polite">
        <div class="matrix-stat"><span>determinant</span><strong id="matrix-det">1.00</strong></div>
        <div class="matrix-stat"><span>area scale</span><strong id="matrix-area">1.00</strong></div>
        <div class="matrix-stat"><span>orientation</span><strong id="matrix-orientation">preserved</strong></div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section class="matrix-canvas-wrap" aria-label="Transformed grid visualization">
      <div class="matrix-legend">
        <span><i class="legend-line" style="background:#cfd6e3"></i>original grid</span>
        <span><i class="legend-line" style="background:#2f6fdd"></i>image of vertical lines</span>
        <span><i class="legend-line" style="background:#e07a2f"></i>image of horizontal lines</span>
        <span><i class="legend-line" style="background:#159a8a"></i>basis vectors</span>
      </div>
      <svg class="matrix-canvas" id="matrix-svg" viewBox="0 0 760 610" role="img" aria-label="Original grid and transformed grid under a two by two matrix"></svg>
    </section>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
(() => {
  const svg = document.getElementById("matrix-svg");
  const inputs = {
    a: document.getElementById("matrix-a"),
    b: document.getElementById("matrix-b"),
    c: document.getElementById("matrix-c"),
    d: document.getElementById("matrix-d"),
  };
  const detEl = document.getElementById("matrix-det");
  const areaEl = document.getElementById("matrix-area");
  const orientationEl = document.getElementById("matrix-orientation");
  const resetButton = document.getElementById("matrix-reset");
  const presets = document.querySelectorAll("#matrix-transform-widget [data-matrix]");

  const width = 760;
  const height = 610;
  const margin = 46;
  const gridExtent = 4;
  const defaultMatrix = [1, 0.6, -0.3, 1];
  svg.setAttribute("viewBox", `0 0 ${width} ${height}`);

  function numberFrom(input, fallback) {
    const value = Number(input.value);
    return Number.isFinite(value) ? value : fallback;
  }

  function currentMatrix() {
    return [
      numberFrom(inputs.a, 0),
      numberFrom(inputs.b, 0),
      numberFrom(inputs.c, 0),
      numberFrom(inputs.d, 0),
    ];
  }

  function applyMatrix(matrix, point) {
    const [a, b, c, d] = matrix;
    const [x, y] = point;
    return [a * x + b * y, c * x + d * y];
  }

  function linePoints(matrix) {
    const points = [];
    for (let i = -gridExtent; i <= gridExtent; i += 1) {
      points.push(applyMatrix(matrix, [i, -gridExtent]));
      points.push(applyMatrix(matrix, [i, gridExtent]));
      points.push(applyMatrix(matrix, [-gridExtent, i]));
      points.push(applyMatrix(matrix, [gridExtent, i]));
    }
    points.push([-gridExtent, -gridExtent], [gridExtent, gridExtent]);
    points.push(applyMatrix(matrix, [1, 0]), applyMatrix(matrix, [0, 1]));
    return points;
  }

  function viewport(matrix) {
    const points = linePoints(matrix);
    const maxAbs = Math.max(
      1,
      ...points.map(([x, y]) => Math.max(Math.abs(x), Math.abs(y)))
    );
    const world = Math.ceil(maxAbs * 1.15);
    const scale = Math.min((width - 2 * margin) / (2 * world), (height - 2 * margin) / (2 * world));

    return {
      world,
      scale,
      project([x, y]) {
        return [
          width / 2 + x * scale,
          height / 2 - y * scale,
        ];
      },
    };
  }

  function svgEl(name, attrs = {}) {
    const node = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", name);
    for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(attrs)) {
      node.setAttribute(key, value);
    }
    return node;
  }

  function addLine(group, view, p1, p2, attrs) {
    const [x1, y1] = view.project(p1);
    const [x2, y2] = view.project(p2);
    group.appendChild(svgEl("line", { x1, y1, x2, y2, ...attrs }));
  }

  function addPolyline(group, view, points, attrs) {
    const projected = points.map((point) => view.project(point).map((x) => x.toFixed(2)).join(",")).join(" ");
    group.appendChild(svgEl("polyline", { points: projected, ...attrs }));
  }

  function addArrow(group, view, start, end, color, label) {
    addLine(group, view, start, end, {
      stroke: color,
      "stroke-width": 4,
      "stroke-linecap": "round",
      "marker-end": `url(#arrow-${color.slice(1)})`,
    });

    const [x, y] = view.project(end);
    const text = svgEl("text", {
      x: x + 8,
      y: y - 8,
      fill: color,
      "font-size": 16,
      "font-weight": 700,
    });
    text.textContent = label;
    group.appendChild(text);
  }

  function marker(color) {
    return `
      <marker id="arrow-${color.slice(1)}" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="10" refX="8" refY="3" orient="auto" markerUnits="strokeWidth">
        <path d="M0,0 L0,6 L8,3 z" fill="${color}" />
      </marker>
    `;
  }

  function render() {
    const matrix = currentMatrix();
    const [a, b, c, d] = matrix;
    const det = a * d - b * c;
    const view = viewport(matrix);

    svg.innerHTML = `
      <defs>
        ${marker("#159a8a")}
        ${marker("#b45309")}
      </defs>
      <rect width="${width}" height="${height}" fill="#ffffff"></rect>
    `;

    const original = svgEl("g");
    const transformed = svgEl("g");
    const foreground = svgEl("g");
    svg.append(original, transformed, foreground);

    for (let i = -gridExtent; i <= gridExtent; i += 1) {
      const strong = i === 0;
      addLine(original, view, [i, -gridExtent], [i, gridExtent], {
        stroke: strong ? "#9aa4b2" : "#cfd6e3",
        "stroke-width": strong ? 1.8 : 1,
      });
      addLine(original, view, [-gridExtent, i], [gridExtent, i], {
        stroke: strong ? "#9aa4b2" : "#cfd6e3",
        "stroke-width": strong ? 1.8 : 1,
      });
    }

    for (let i = -gridExtent; i <= gridExtent; i += 1) {
      const verticalStart = applyMatrix(matrix, [i, -gridExtent]);
      const verticalEnd = applyMatrix(matrix, [i, gridExtent]);
      const horizontalStart = applyMatrix(matrix, [-gridExtent, i]);
      const horizontalEnd = applyMatrix(matrix, [gridExtent, i]);
      addLine(transformed, view, verticalStart, verticalEnd, {
        stroke: i === 0 ? "#184fa3" : "#2f6fdd",
        "stroke-width": i === 0 ? 2.4 : 1.5,
        opacity: 0.86,
      });
      addLine(transformed, view, horizontalStart, horizontalEnd, {
        stroke: i === 0 ? "#b45309" : "#e07a2f",
        "stroke-width": i === 0 ? 2.4 : 1.5,
        opacity: 0.86,
      });
    }

    const square = [
      applyMatrix(matrix, [0, 0]),
      applyMatrix(matrix, [1, 0]),
      applyMatrix(matrix, [1, 1]),
      applyMatrix(matrix, [0, 1]),
      applyMatrix(matrix, [0, 0]),
    ];
    addPolyline(foreground, view, square, {
      fill: "rgba(21, 154, 138, 0.14)",
      stroke: "#159a8a",
      "stroke-width": 3,
      "stroke-linejoin": "round",
    });

    addArrow(foreground, view, [0, 0], applyMatrix(matrix, [1, 0]), "#159a8a", "Ae1");
    addArrow(foreground, view, [0, 0], applyMatrix(matrix, [0, 1]), "#b45309", "Ae2");

    const origin = view.project([0, 0]);
    foreground.appendChild(svgEl("circle", {
      cx: origin[0],
      cy: origin[1],
      r: 4,
      fill: "#111827",
    }));

    detEl.textContent = det.toFixed(3);
    areaEl.textContent = Math.abs(det).toFixed(3);
    orientationEl.textContent =
      Math.abs(det) < 1e-9 ? "collapsed" : det > 0 ? "preserved" : "reversed";
  }

  function setMatrix(values) {
    [inputs.a.value, inputs.b.value, inputs.c.value, inputs.d.value] = values;
    render();
  }

  Object.values(inputs).forEach((input) => input.addEventListener("input", render));
  presets.forEach((button) => {
    button.addEventListener("click", () => setMatrix(button.dataset.matrix.split(",").map(Number)));
  });
  resetButton.addEventListener("click", () => setMatrix(defaultMatrix));

  render();
})();
</script>
```

The determinant is a compact summary of what the map does to area and orientation:

$$
\det A = ad-bc.
$$

If $\det A>0$, orientation is preserved. If $\det A<0$, orientation is reversed. If $\det A=0$, the plane collapses onto a line or point, so the transformation is not invertible.
